source: GDC State of the Industry salary survey ranges and public compensation data (US figures, USD)

Gameplay / Engine Programmer.notes: Engine and multiplayer specialists command the top of each band

Technical Artist.notes: Bridges art and engineering; consistently under-supplied

3D / Environment Artist.notes: Portfolio quality matters more than years

Game Designer.notes: Systems and economy designers earn above level designers

Producer.notes: Live-ops and shipped-title experience raise the ceiling

QA / QA Lead.notes: Automation QA pays well above manual QA
